prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: He Knows I Bake at Midnight
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Lifetime Original
Tagline: Where every secret comes home.
Theme: Silence is just fear wearing cashmere.
Omen: a child drawing stairs
Relationship dynamic: secret half sibling
Props: ceramic owl, blood-adjacent tea towel, unopened letter

Cast:
- Daniel Pike | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=lawyer | threat_aura=0.46 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family; buried one traumatic detail under work for years
- Evelyn Vale | archetype=decorative_husband | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=financial advisor | threat_aura=0.37 | space=marina tackle room described as donation overflow | secrets=was in the wrong county on the wrong night

- Gavin Hawthorne | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=artisan developer | threat_aura=0.73 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=has a second phone labeled as a work precaution
- Derek Bell | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=local podcaster | threat_aura=0.25 | space=old family office described as donation overflow | secrets=keeps screenshots like religious texts
- Mara Winterson | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Cole Cross | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Evelyn Vale is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Daniel Pike says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Alder Ridge.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Evelyn?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Mara. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Daniel. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The ceramic owl is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Evelyn."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."

- expanded_synopsis: string, 180-320 words
